offer: For property managers overseeing 5–15 properties, overdue maintenance tasks cause tenant dissatisfaction. We automate task monitoring instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or email.
problem: Overdue maintenance tasks lead to tenant dissatisfaction and potential property damage.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try task monitoring dashboard with 1-3 tasks
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
